title: Herringbone Laminate Flooring
shortDescription: Premium zigzag pattern laminate flooring. Looks like luxury real wood but is much stronger and scratch-resistant. Fast delivery available in Gurugram and Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Upgrade your home or office with Goals Floors' Cobra Herringbone Laminate Flooring. This beautiful zigzag pattern gives a very expensive and luxury look to any room. Traditionally, this design was only available in real hardwood, which is very hard to maintain. We bring you this exact premium look in a tough, easy-to-maintain laminate format.

Our herringbone flooring is built for the dynamic lifestyle of Delhi NCR. It has a strong High-Density Fiber (HDF) core and a tough AC-4 top layer. This means it can easily handle extreme weather changes, heavy foot traffic, and moving furniture without getting damaged.

Whether you are renovating a living room in DLF Gurugram or setting up a modern office in Noida, this flooring provides the perfect balance of luxury and strength. It is highly scratch-resistant, very easy to clean, and gives your space an instant premium makeover.

features.title: Classic Zigzag Design
features.description: The timeless V-shaped pattern gives your room a larger, more expensive, and luxurious feel compared to normal straight planks.

features.title: Highly Durable (AC-4 Grade)
features.description: Built tough to handle heavy foot traffic. It is perfect for busy homes, showrooms, and corporate office spaces.

features.title: Strong Wood Core
features.description: Made with a premium High-Density Fiberboard (HDF) core that stays flat and stable even during weather and temperature changes.

features.title: Scratch & Spill Resistant
features.description: A protective top layer keeps the floor safe from pet claws, furniture scratches, and daily liquid spills.

features.title: Fast NCR Delivery
features.description: We keep ready stock in our central warehouse, ensuring quick 2-hour dispatch to Delhi, Gurugram, Noida, and Faridabad.

features.title: Safe for Kids & Pets
features.description: Certified for indoor air quality, meaning it does not release harmful chemicals and is completely safe for your family.

installation: It uses a modern 'Click-Lock' system, meaning the planks easily lock into each other without any messy glue. To get the perfect zigzag pattern, you need a flat floor and a soft foam underlay sheet. Because the pattern needs perfect alignment, we highly recommend using professional installers.
maintenance: Very easy to clean. Just use a normal broom or vacuum for daily dust. For deep cleaning, use a slightly damp (wet) microfiber mop. Please avoid using abrasive scrubbers or throwing buckets of water on the floor.

faqs.question: What is Herringbone flooring?
faqs.answer: Herringbone is a beautiful zigzag pattern that makes the floor look very premium and classic. We offer this exact luxury design in a highly durable wooden laminate material.

faqs.question: What is the price of this flooring in Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Our premium Cobra Herringbone flooring starts at competitive project rates (approx ₹189/sq.ft). For bulk orders or commercial projects in Gurgaon, please contact us directly for special B2B pricing.

faqs.question: Will it get spoiled in Delhi NCR's hot and humid weather?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our flooring has a strong HDF core made specifically to handle the extreme heat and moisture variations of the Delhi NCR climate much better than standard wood.

faqs.question: Does it easily get scratched by chairs or pets?
faqs.answer: No, it has an AC-4 commercial-grade top layer. This makes it highly resistant to scratches from pet claws, high heels, and moving furniture.

faqs.question: Can I install it over my old tiles or marble floor?
faqs.answer: Yes! You don't need to break your old floor. As long as your existing tiles or marble are completely flat and dry, we can install this flooring directly over them.

faqs.question: How do I clean this wooden floor daily?
faqs.answer: It is very simple. Just sweep or vacuum normally. If something spills, wipe it with a slightly damp cloth. You don't need any special chemicals, and avoid using excess water.

faqs.question: Do you provide installation services in Noida and Delhi?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have expert installation teams across Delhi, Noida, and Gurugram. They specialize in fitting the complex zigzag herringbone pattern perfectly.

faqs.question: Is it safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, the HDF core of our laminate flooring is specially treated during manufacturing, making it highly resistant to termites and borers for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: What does AC-4 grade mean?
faqs.answer: AC-4 is an international durability rating. It means the floor is tough enough to handle heavy traffic in commercial spaces like cafes and offices, so it will easily last a very long time in your home.

faqs.question: Can I buy it for a single bedroom, or do you only do large projects?
faqs.answer: We do both! While we are major suppliers for architects and builders in NCR, you can easily order this premium flooring for just a single bedroom or living room makeover.

installationSteps.title: Check the Floor
points: Make sure the floor is 100% dry and free of moisture.
The surface must be completely flat and level.
Clean all dust, dirt, and construction debris.
installationSteps.tip: Installing over a wet or uneven floor will damage the wooden planks over time.

installationSteps.title: Understanding the Pattern
points: The planks come in two types: A and B.
Connect an A-plank to a B-plank at a perfect 90-degree angle.
Always follow a straight center line to keep the design aligned.
installationSteps.tip: Draw a straight chalk line on the floor to make sure your zigzag pattern doesn't go crooked.

installationSteps.title: Locking the Planks
points: Angle the plank slightly and push it firmly into the joint.
Use a specialized tapping block to ensure a very tight fit.
Check closely to make sure there are no visible gaps between the patterns.
